name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement

labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""

## Problem statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why does it matter for AI governance? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature. Be specific about behavior, not just the end goal. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why did you prefer this one? -->

## Scope

Which part of the system does this touch?

- [ ] Policy engine (`backend/services/policy_engine.py`)
- [ ] Model routing (`backend/services/routing_engine.py`, `ai_router.py`)
- [ ] Frontend governance dashboard
- [ ] Audit log / governance events
- [ ] Agent framework
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Docker / deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Would you be willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, but I can help review
- [ ] Not sure
